title: storage — scheduled tasks
description: Recurring background work registered with Laravel's Scheduler. Every job is idempotent + uses shouldBeUnique guards so overlapping runs are impossible.

schedule.description: Nightly at 03:00 UTC. Sweeps soft-deleted + archived files past their per-kind retention window. Batches at 500 rows/run to keep DB pressure low.
Nightly at 03:30 UTC. Hard-deletes ChunkedUploads in aborted/expired state older than 7 days + cleans provider multipart parts.
Hourly. Marks SignedUrlAudit rows where expires_at < NOW() AND revoked_at IS NULL as revoked. Fires SignedUrlRevoked per row.
Hourly at :15. Reconciles storage.bytes.consumed + storage.files.max_per_workspace per workspace. Corrects drift + emits StorageQuotaApproaching when crossing the 80% threshold.

Weekly at 04:00 UTC on Sundays. Reconciles ContentAddressableStore refcount against actual File row count per sha256. Reports drift; does NOT delete (deletion happens naturally through the last-referrer hard-delete path).

Every 6 hours. Refreshes the AV signature version cache + fires storage::AntivirusSignaturesUpdated if the version changed. Downstream: storage:rescan-virus can operate against the newly-loaded signatures.

Monthly at 02:00 UTC on the 1st. Rotates the signed-URL signing key. Previous key retained for 30 days grace so in-flight signatures survive. Governed by config('storage.signing_key_rotation_days', 30).
